Black Adam (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $168,283,344Details
International Box Office $225,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $393,583,344
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,261,855
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $10,373,963
Total $16,635,818
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Nearly 5,000 years after he was bestowed with the almighty powers of the Egyptian gods—and imprisoned just as quickly—Black Adam is freed from his earthly tomb, ready to unleash his unique form of justice on the modern world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$67,004,323 (39.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,402 opening theaters/4,402 max. theaters, 6.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $191,019,893

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 21st, 2022 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
October 21st, 2022 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: October 19th, 2022 (Wide) (Philippines)
October 19th, 2022 (Wide) (France)
October 19th, 2022 (Wide) (Indonesia)
October 19th, 2022 (Wide), released as Black Adam (블랙 아담) (South Korea)
October 20th, 2022 (Wide) (Slovakia)
Video Release: November 22nd, 2022 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of strong violence, intense action and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2749 (cert #53997), 9/14/2022)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Franchise: DC Extended Universe
Filming location (city or town): Atlanta, GA, Los Angeles, CA

Genre:Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Nearly 5,000 years after he was bestowed with the almighty powers of the Egyptian gods—and imprisoned just as quickly—Black Adam is freed from his earthly tomb, ready to unleash his unique form of justice on the modern world.
